case_title: BIANCA BAHMAN VS. SUNHILL ENTERPRISES, LP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY BAHMAN, BIANCA AS TO DEFENDANT SUNHILL ENTERPRISES, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNHILL ENTERPRISES, LP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-16-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAHMAN, BIANCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUNHILL ENTERPRISES, LP $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,660.00, "THE PLAINTIFF'S ONE YEAR LEASE WITH DEFENDANT SUNHILL ENTERPRISES, LP, IS TERMINATED EFFECTIVE FEBRUARY 28, 2013" PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-16-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-16-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY AUGUSTO ILLIDGE--BLDG.
